chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-3099 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ D/o matter 1. For order on CMA No.2564/2026 2. For order on CMA No.2565/2026 04.02.2026. Mr. Mayhar Kazi, Advocate for the Petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent Nos.2 & 5. --------------- Learned counsel for the Department states that the listed application does not relate to him and is merely directed at the Nazir. In view of para-9 of the Affidavit filed in support of the listed the application, the same stands allowed. The Nazir may return the bank guarantee identified in the application to the Petitioner upon production of a copy of the relevant certificate, subject to verification and fulfilment of other codal formalities. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
